events.name: John Smith
events.transcript: Hello, thank you for calling. How can I help you today?

events.name: Sarah Johnson
events.transcript: Hi, I'm calling about my recent order. I wanted to check on the delivery status.

events.name: John Smith
events.transcript: Let me look that up for you. Your order is currently in transit and should arrive by Friday.

events.name: Sarah Johnson
events.transcript: Great, thank you so much for your help!
